description: Refactor the 'demodb' database (user: admin, pass: admin) to support a new VIP tier for Japanese customers. Create a new class 'VIPProfiles' that extends the existing 'Profiles' class, a 'Managers' vertex class, and a 'ManagedBy' edge class. Migrate all profiles with Nationality='Japanese' from the 'Profiles' class to the 'VIPProfiles' class, ensuring all existing data and graph connections are preserved. Create a manager vertex named 'Akira Kurosawa' and link all 'VIPProfiles' to this manager using 'ManagedBy' edges.
